title: Not Enough Dinosaurs
description: A  simple mod that adds Prehistoric Creatures with a mix of scientific, fantasy and adventuring elements
body:
Warning : this is my first mod and  it's still in beta so not many features have been added. There is also no guarantee that i will even consistently update this mod as i might be busy with school. This mod was made using MCreator so props to them for making modding minecraft easier.

Not Enough Dinosaurs is a mod that will add both obscure and well known creatures to minecraft. The dinosaurs spawn in the overworld in specific biomes and can be revived by fossils in the future. see changelog for full list of features in each version

**Only baby mobs are tameable

all creatures info will be added to paleo book soon

Creature  List, spawn, behavior, tame item : **

Oviraptor - desert, neutral, spider eye
Dilophosaurus - savannah, hostile, raw beef
Guanlong - forest, hostile, raw chicken
Dimetrodon - swamp, hostile to all, rotten flesh
Shastasaurus - deep ocean, hostile to all, elder guardian spike
Trilobite - ocean, neutral, untameable
Archelon - ocean, neutral, kelp
Nigersaurus - plains, neutral, cherry sapling
Hagfish - ocean, neutral, untameable
Edmontonia - taiga, neutral, ferns, tallgrass
Shunosaurus - plains, neutral, sunflower
Spinosaurus - swamp, hostile, raw salmon
